title: WIP: Test PR for issue 4021
body:
***DO NOT MERGE***

Hypothesis:  Because ALL three flake re-runs of the `podman-remote run --rm...` test always fail in ~10second window, some other state of the system increases the reproduction-chance.

Forcing test-order with `-seed 1569003575` (taken from another example of this failure)
